textByHash.001d469d8ab33431188b717d6228fc57267ed854: Hector were very successful and became very rich. But about a year ago we were boarded by the Customs and Excise Agents.
textByHash.01673b15330075cf8a425d27588a825c8ffc9d0d: No lass, you got it fair and square.
textByHash.084a7973f0585b17b45d35a36cec1aaf8d14e9cf: Arr, silly you. Fortunately I took the precaution to have another one made.
textByHash.154122322a7e25771f3c5ce00944666cd92875d0: Arr - this here rum's got a banana stuck in it!
textByHash.15c323799a45cfdfc1b2aa83e43e491339e2e215: This be Hector's key. I believe it opens his chest in his old room in the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock.
textByHash.223026f0c9ac3afed1d64ed2edd1112fb7b49f94: The Customs office has been clampin' down on the export of spirits. You seem like a resourceful young lass, I'm sure ye'll be able to find a way to slip the stuff past them.
textByHash.22ad4fe78fcf66a086a613493951bfc8ef80f932: I'm not allowed in the Blue Moon Inn. Apparently I'm a drunken trouble maker.
textByHash.2474dd91d31f5a958a748139dd0d4daed902650e: Arr - I don't likes banana in me rum!
textByHash.489eb3ce32a2df551c3571800a6e3978b0cd3375: You enjoy it. It's what Hector would have wanted.
textByHash.5ef2cdf72d5e244e241b53c913d0c50c63c91a3d: Arr, treasure you be after eh? Well I might be able to tell you where to find some... For a price...
textByHash.68f72b3b5153f32ce52e64fe27dfc2b65caa9eac: Nothin' at the moment, but then again the Customs Agents are on the warpath right now.
textByHash.6aaf426fefcece108374ffac43c186e890044aa3: The Customs office has been clampin' down on the export of spirits. You seem like a resourceful young lad, I'm sure ye'll be able to find a way to slip the stuff past them.
textByHash.6e3337ef14a3faa14ad91694a05ce5604785b697: No lad, you got it fair and square.
textByHash.6fc863d3d880573e87798ab9b4dbf56254b36e2c: It's Karamja Rum or no deal.
textByHash.7800df3d9e79e6632d17b00bc30759ab8de4b7e9: Yer a saint, although it'll take a miracle to get it off Karamja.
textByHash.79be729857e057b2d63c3fb2a443dff8b780238d: With any luck his treasure will be in there.
textByHash.854e9385190631c571b9f23189e000960da10ae3: Not surprising, tis no easy task to get it off Karamja.
textByHash.a5fed249ccbe31c27f075978e3952e42636cf765: I'd like some rum made on Karamja Island. There's no rum like Karamja Rum!
textByHash.b7ef82d1f3cec2d7b1926741b72dad6280e27d92: Thanks fer the thought, but I still have to finish this bottle.
textByHash.baf2fdbc3277ed7216a7c8b14408499eb517d093: Fair enough. I'll still be here and thirsty whenever you feel like helpin' out.
textByHash.c066113f6a0b813667e1cce5d89bad4b76f2591f: Have ye brought some rum for yer ol' mate Frank?
textByHash.c9ff9516f5b718d6d9789db83f2a4a3b33614ed3: Now a deal's a deal, I'll tell ye about the treasure. I used to serve under a pirate captain called One-Eyed Hector.
textByHash.d3eb0433737412aae47fc884ea9e80113a6c0819: Well for example if you can get me a bottle of rum... Not just any rum mind...
textByHash.da735db7ae60b7f8693b43d5502be3bc597cfb56: Gadzooks, that swill! Not a chance!
textByHash.fa4c64654827468042ecbe8cda24e7d6ca91aa30: Hector were killed along with many of the crew, I were one of the few to escape and I escaped with this.
